locations.name: 巴納豪火山
locations.summary: 巴納豪火山是菲律賓的火山，位於呂宋島南部，海拔高度2,170米，山體由安山岩組成，火山口長3.5公里、寬1.5公里，最近一次火山噴發在1843年發生。 外部連結 Philippine Institute of Volcanology an…

locations.name: Mount Isarog
locations.summary: Isarog is an active stratovolcano located in the province of Camarines Sur, Philippines, on the island of Luzon.

relations.subject: Luzon flameback
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Banahaw, Mount Makiling, Mount Isarog, Bataan National Park and Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation and hunting continues despite this protection on paper

relations.subject: Luzon flameback
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, and the illegal wildlife trade
